shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The indicator uses a continuous gold guide line and grounded support base.
differences: Warning orange pixels intensify during danger states.
The lower support plate widens near the meter anchor.
The top cap carries bright cream pixels for quick visibility.

context.usage: Vertical centerline that communicates left-right weight balance.

specs.texture: Gold guide line with warning orange inner groove and a mud-anchored base.
specs.shading: Flat fill with a bright cream edge.

acceptance_criteria: Axis texture size is exactly 64x448px with the guide line centered on x32.
The gold guide line stays continuous from top cap to base.
Warning accent pixels stay inside the inner groove.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle anchored to the board midpoint.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_balance_axis_beam_64x448.png and attach it to the board root entity.
runtime_notes: Keep the pivot on the exact board midpoint.
Apply warning flashes through color modulation.
Preserve a transparent gutter for overlay dots.
